title: sakurafetch
description: Falling cherry blossom petals + neofetch-style system info in your terminal. Curses-based TUI with multiple themes, wind simulation, and falling petal accumulation.

title: betjee: virtual prediction market
description: built a virtual prediction market for jee shifts, loved on r/jeeneetards. reached 1.2m requests, 2.3k users — mostly from reddit. documented some dumb decisions that blew past the free tier.

title: no-cursor
description: CLI-first code editor with llama.cpp integration for fully local operation.

title: filesense
description: Local file organizer that groups documents using semantic similarity and user feedback.

title: threads
description: High-availability Q&A social platform with a 4-layer moderation pipeline. Dockerized Node.js on Google Cloud Run.

title: air quality index prediction
description: Predicts next-day AQI values using historical air quality data and machine learning.

title: e-waste recycling platform
description: Web platform that identifies electronic waste categories and suggests nearby recycling centers.

title: face detection doorcam
description: Real-time face detection system using OpenCV for basic monitoring and alerts.

title: cli chat application
description: Command-line chat program implementing basic client–server communication.

title: discord moderator bot
description: Discord bot that detects similar phrases using text vectorization for basic moderation.

title: movies crud api
description: REST API for managing movie records built using Go.

title: trash collector cli
description: Simple CLI tool to store and track ideas or tasks from the terminal.
